summary: Comprehensive testing completed for upgraded blog management system in Admin Dashboard. Backend APIs fully functional at 100% success rate. Frontend professional card-based blog editor working correctly with all key features verified through UI testing and code analysis.
passed_tests: Backend API - POST /api/blog creates new blog posts with admin auth
Backend API - PUT /api/blog/post-002 successfully updates existing posts
Backend API - GET /api/blog/post-002 verifies post updates are persisted
Backend API - PUT /api/blog/{test_id} updates newly created posts
Backend API - DELETE /api/blog/{test_id} deletes posts successfully
Backend API - GET /api/blog/{deleted_id} returns 404 for deleted posts
Backend API - Admin authentication with session token admin_session_1773937338274
Frontend - Admin Dashboard loads correctly at /admin route
Frontend - Blog tab navigation (second tab) functions properly
Frontend - Blog posts displayed as professional cards (3 cards found)
Frontend - Blog cards show image thumbnails and category badges
Frontend - All 4 action buttons present: Preview (eye), Edit (pencil), View on Site (external link), Delete (trash)
Frontend - Preview dialog opens correctly with post title, image, content
Frontend - Preview dialog contains Edit Post and View on Site buttons
Frontend - Preview dialog closes properly via escape or close button
Code Analysis - Edit dialog implements two-column layout (content left, metadata right)
Code Analysis - Category dropdown contains all 8 preset options: Work Visa, Tips, News, Study Abroad, Travel, Success Story, Immigration Law, Employer Guide
Code Analysis - Excerpt field has 160 character limit with counter display
Code Analysis - Content field displays character count
Code Analysis - Image URL field shows live preview of images
Code Analysis - Delete confirmation dialog implemented with post title
Code Analysis - Create New Post button opens clean form (not pre-filled)
Code Analysis - All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
